name: Horror
description: Atmospheric terror with resource scarcity, vulnerability, and psychological tension

mechanics.coreLoop: Explore threatening environment → Manage scarce resources → Solve puzzles under pressure → Evade or confront threats → Uncover disturbing story → Survive escalating horror
playerActions: Navigate dark, oppressive environments with limited visibility
Manage flashlight battery and limited ammunition
Hide from unkillable or powerful enemies
Collect documents and audio logs revealing story
Choose fight or flight when confronted by threats

mechanics: Story-based progression through chapters or areas
Unlock new tools or weapons (rarely powerful)
Safe rooms for saving and inventory management
Increase health capacity through rare items
Multiple endings based on choices or performance

winConditions: Uncover the truth behind the horror
Defeat or banish the primary threat
failConditions: Health depleted by enemies or hazards (game over)
Reload from last save point or checkpoint

resourceSystems.name: Health
resourceSystems.mechanics: Very limited healing items, damage is impactful and scary

resourceSystems.name: Ammunition
resourceSystems.mechanics: Extremely limited bullets, must decide when to fight vs flee

resourceSystems.name: Light Source (Battery/Oil)
resourceSystems.mechanics: Darkness is dangerous, light is essential but limited

resourceSystems.name: Sanity/Mental State
resourceSystems.mechanics: Witnessing horror degrades sanity, causes hallucinations or debuffs

setting.era: Contemporary, historical gothic, or near-future dystopia
setting.location: Isolated locations: abandoned mansion, haunted asylum, derelict spaceship, foggy town
setting.worldType: Grounded reality corrupted by supernatural, psychological, or cosmic horror

protagonist.background: Ordinary person trapped in nightmare scenario, investigator, or survivor seeking answers
protagonist.motivation: Survive, find missing loved one, uncover conspiracy, escape the nightmare, seek redemption
abilities: Resourcefulness and problem-solving under extreme stress
Determination to survive despite overwhelming odds
Ability to maintain sanity in the face of incomprehensible horror

conflict.primary: Trapped in location with deadly supernatural/monstrous threat hunting the protagonist
secondary: Disturbing revelations about the nature of reality
Other victims who may help or hinder
Cultists or human antagonists serving greater evil

worldRules.physics: Realistic with violations that create unease (impossible geometry, altered physics)
worldRules.magic: Dark magic, cursed artifacts, or cosmic forces beyond human comprehension
worldRules.technology: Limited technology, often unreliable or corrupted by the horror

difficulty: Challenging through resource scarcity and tension
targetAudience: Players seeking intense psychological experiences and atmosphere
